creator: liu_yinghong@yahoo.com.cn
text:
New port:multimedia/smplayer-themes derive from multimedia/smplayer.Thanks!

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=113679

--- smplayer-ports.shar begins here ---
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	smplayer
#	smplayer-ports.shar
#	smplayer-qt4
#	smplayer-themes
#	smplayer-qt4/Makefile
#	smplayer-themes/Makefile
#	smplayer-themes/distinfo
#	smplayer-themes/pkg-descr
#	smplayer-themes/pkg-plist
#	smplayer/Makefile
#	smplayer/distinfo
#	smplayer/files
#	smplayer/pkg-descr
#	smplayer/pkg-plist
#	smplayer/files/patch-Makefile
#
echo c - smplayer
mkdir -p smplayer > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - smplayer-ports.shar
sed 's/^X//' >smplayer-ports.shar << 'END-of-smplayer-ports.shar'
X# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
X# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
X# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
X# have default permissions.
X#
X# This archive contains:
X#
X#	smplayer
X#	smplayer-ports.shar
X#	smplayer-qt4
X#	smplayer-themes
X#	smplayer-qt4/Makefile
X#	smplayer-themes/Makefile
X#	smplayer-themes/distinfo
X#	smplayer-themes/pkg-descr
X#	smplayer-themes/pkg-plist
X#	smplayer/Makefile
X#	smplayer/distinfo
X#	smplayer/files
X#	smplayer/pkg-descr
X#	smplayer/pkg-plist
X#	smplayer/files/patch-Makefile
X#
Xecho c - smplayer
Xmkdir -p smplayer > /dev/null 2>&1
Xecho x - smplayer-ports.shar
Xsed 's/^X//' >smplayer-ports.shar << 'END-of-smplayer-ports.shar'
END-of-smplayer-ports.shar
echo c - smplayer-qt4
mkdir -p smplayer-qt4 > /dev/null 2>&1
echo c - smplayer-themes
mkdir -p smplayer-themes > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - smplayer-qt4/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >smplayer-qt4/Makefile << 'END-of-smplayer-qt4/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	smplayer-qt4
X# Date created:				16 Jun, 2007
X# Whom:	Diego Depaoli <trebestie@gmail.com> and Yinghong.Liu <liu_yinghong@yahoo.com.cn>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPKGNAMESUFFIX=	-qt4
X
XCOMMENT=	A complete front-end based on QT4 for mplayer
X
XCONFLICTS=	smplayer-[0-9]*
X
XMASTERDIR=	${.CURDIR}/../../multimedia/smplayer
X
X.include "${MASTERDIR}/Makefile"
END-of-smplayer-qt4/Makefile
echo x - smplayer-themes/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >smplayer-themes/Makefile << 'END-of-smplayer-themes/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	mplayer-themes
X# Date created:				18 Jun, 2007
X# Whom:	Diego Depaoli <trebestie@gmail.com> and Yinghong.Liu <liu_yinghong@yahoo.com.cn>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	smplayer-themes
XPORTVERSION=	0.1.1
XCATEGORIES=	multimedia audio kde
XMASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=smplayer
X
XMAINTAINER=	liu_yinghong@yahoo.com.cn
XCOMMENT=	Themes for smplayer
X
XNO_BUILD=	yes
X
Xpost-patch:
X	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|PREFIX=/usr/local|PREFIX=${PREFIX}|g' \
X		${WRKSRC}/Makefile
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-smplayer-themes/Makefile
echo x - smplayer-themes/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >smplayer-themes/distinfo << 'END-of-smplayer-themes/distinfo'
XMD5 (smplayer-themes-0.1.1.tar.gz) = 1c1e241522ba0262b1363e3acebb3e32
XSHA256 (smplayer-themes-0.1.1.tar.gz) = ec6a0296ee7cc18a5f1db6c6eef2fda1a2cfb61f54523de15e4caad8046912a3
XSIZE (smplayer-themes-0.1.1.tar.gz) = 1118058
END-of-smplayer-themes/distinfo
echo x - smplayer-themes/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >smplayer-themes/pkg-descr << 'END-of-smplayer-themes/pkg-descr'
XThis is the port of themes for smplayer.
X
XWWW: http://smplayer.sourceforge.net/
END-of-smplayer-themes/pkg-descr
echo x - smplayer-themes/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >smplayer-themes/pkg-plist << 'END-of-smplayer-themes/pkg-plist'

echo x - smplayer/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >smplayer/Makefile << 'END-of-smplayer/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	smplayer
X# Date created:				13 Jun, 2007
X# Whom:	Diego Depaoli <trebestie@gmail.com> and Yinghong.Liu <liu_yinghong@yahoo.com.cn>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	smplayer
XDISTVERSION=	0.5.0
XCATEGORIES=	multimedia audio kde
XMASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=${PORTNAME}
X
XMAINTAINER=	liu_yinghong@yahoo.com.cn
XCOMMENT?=	A complete front-end based on QT3 for mplayer
X
XRUN_DEPENDS=	mplayer:${PORTSDIR}/multimedia/mplayer \
X		${LOCALBASE}/share/smplayer/themes:${PORTSDIR}/multimedia/smplayer-themes
X
X.if defined(PKGNAMESUFFIX) && ${PKGNAMESUFFIX} == "-qt4"
XUSE_QT_VER=	4
XQT_COMPONENTS=	qmake porting moc uic qt3support uic3 corelib gui
X
XALL_TARGET=	prep src/smplayer
X.else
XUSE_QT_VER=	3
X
XCONFLICTS?=	smplayer-qt4-[0-9]*
X
XBUILD_DEPENDS+=	qmake:${PORTSDIR}/devel/qmake
X
XQMAKE=		${QT_PREFIX}/bin/qmake
X
XMAKE_ENV+=	QTDIR=${QT_PREFIX} \
X		QMAKESPEC=${LOCALBASE}/share/qt/mkspecs/freebsd-g++
X
XALL_TARGET=	src/smplayer
X
X.if defined(WITH_KDE)
XUSE_KDELIBS_VER=3
XMAKE_ARGS+=	KDE_SUPPORT=1
X.endif
X.endif
X
XUSE_GMAKE=	yes
XINSTALLS_ICONS=	yes
X
XPORTDOCS=	Changelog Configurable_shortcuts.txt Install.txt \
X		Copying.txt Not_so_obvious_things.txt Translations.txt \
X		Icon_themes.txt Readme.txt
X
Xpost-patch:
X	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|qmake|${QMAKE}|g' \
X		-e 's|PREFIX=/usr/local|PREFIX=${PREFIX}|g' \
X		${WRKSRC}/Makefile
X
Xpost-install:
X.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
X	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
X.for doc in ${PORTDOCS}
X	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${doc} ${DOCSDIR}
X.endfor
X.endif
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-smplayer/Makefile
echo x - smplayer/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >smplayer/distinfo << 'END-of-smplayer/distinfo'
XMD5 (smplayer-0.5.0.tar.gz) = e3282320cb1b186e601511ec51bacdbe
XSHA256 (smplayer-0.5.0.tar.gz) = bb7813566efc0e62d52c68791d6281f66714b3498f5fdc9c5240986ec466a33c
XSIZE (smplayer-0.5.0.tar.gz) = 917326
END-of-smplayer/distinfo
echo c - smplayer/files
mkdir -p smplayer/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - smplayer/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >smplayer/pkg-descr << 'END-of-smplayer/pkg-descr'
Xsmplayer intents to be a complete front-end for mplayer,from
Xbasic features like playing videos, dvds, vcdsto more advancing
Xfeatures like support for mplayer filters,edl lists, and more.
X
XWWW: http://smplayer.sourceforge.net/
END-of-smplayer/pkg-descr

echo x - smplayer/files/patch-Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >smplayer/files/patch-Makefile << 'END-of-smplayer/files/patch-Makefile'
X--- Makefile.orig	Thu Jun 14 20:12:01 2007
X+++ Makefile	Thu Jun 14 20:13:14 2007
X@@ -5,7 +5,6 @@
X CONF_PREFIX=$(PREFIX)
X 
X DATA_PATH=$(PREFIX)/share/smplayer
X-DOC_PATH=$(PREFIX)/share/doc/packages/smplayer
X TRANSLATION_PATH=$(PREFIX)/share/smplayer/translations
X CONF_PATH=$(CONF_PREFIX)/etc/smplayer
X THEMES_PATH=$(PREFIX)/share/smplayer/themes
X@@ -22,7 +21,7 @@
X 
X DEFS=DATA_PATH=\\\"$(DATA_PATH)\\\" CONF_PATH=\\\"$(CONF_PATH)\\\" \
X      TRANSLATION_PATH=\\\"$(TRANSLATION_PATH)\\\" \
X-     DOC_PATH=\\\"$(DOC_PATH)\\\" THEMES_PATH=\\\"$(THEMES_PATH)\\\" \
X+     THEMES_PATH=\\\"$(THEMES_PATH)\\\" \
X      SHORTCUTS_PATH=\\\"$(SHORTCUTS_PATH)\\\"
X 
X 
X@@ -58,8 +57,6 @@
X 	install -m 644 src/input.conf $(DESTDIR)$(DATA_PATH)
X 	-install -d $(DESTDIR)$(TRANSLATION_PATH)
X 	install -m 644 src/translations/*.qm $(DESTDIR)$(TRANSLATION_PATH)
X-	-install -d $(DESTDIR)$(DOC_PATH)
X-	install -m 644 Changelog *.txt $(DESTDIR)$(DOC_PATH)
X 
X 	-install -d $(DESTDIR)$(SHORTCUTS_PATH)
X 	cp src/shortcuts/* $(DESTDIR)$(SHORTCUTS_PATH)
X@@ -79,8 +76,6 @@
X 	-rm $(PREFIX)/bin/smplayer
X 	-rm $(DATA_PATH)/input.conf
X 	-rm $(TRANSLATION_PATH)/*.qm
X-	-rm $(DOC_PATH)/Changelog
X-	-rm $(DOC_PATH)/*.txt
X 	-rm $(SHORTCUTS_PATH)/*.keys
X 	-rm $(KDE_ICONS)/64x64/apps/smplayer.png
X 	-rm $(KDE_ICONS)/32x32/apps/smplayer.png
X@@ -88,5 +83,4 @@
X 	-rm $(KDE_ICONS)/16x16/apps/smplayer.png
X 	-rm $(KDE_APPLNK)/smplayer.desktop
X 	-rmdir $(TRANSLATION_PATH)/
X-	-rmdir $(DOC_PATH)/
X 	-rmdir $(DATA_PATH)/
END-of-smplayer/files/patch-Makefile
exit
